name: ExtensionChargeItem_TotalPriceComponent
title: R5: Total price overriding the associated rules (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `ChargeItem.totalPriceComponent` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`ChargeItem.totalPriceComponent` 0..1 `MonetaryComponent`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `ChargeItem.totalPriceComponent` 0..1 `MonetaryComponent`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `ChargeItem.totalPriceComponent` has a context of ChargeItem based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `ChargeItem`.
Element `ChargeItem.totalPriceComponent` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Total price overriding the associated rules (new)
element.comment:
Element `ChargeItem.totalPriceComponent` has a context of ChargeItem based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `ChargeItem`.
Element `ChargeItem.totalPriceComponent` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
 Often, the total price may be be calculated and recorded on the Invoice, but if a calculated total price must be exchanged prior to Invoice creation, it can be communicated in this property.

element.short: DataType slice for a FHIR R5 `MonetaryComponent` value
element.definition: Slice to indicate the presence of a R5 `MonetaryComponent` in FHIR R4
